title: A Beginner-Friendly Protocol for Questionnaire-Based Data Collection
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"qvbul","text":"This protocol provides a simple and structured approach for collecting data using questionnaires. It is designed for beginners with little or no prior research experience. The protocol explains how to design a questionnaire, select participants, distribute the survey, and store collected data securely. It can be applied in social sciences, education, and general research studies.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"09ls3","text":"1. Step 1: Define the research objective clearly.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uyxpu","text":"2. Step 2: Prepare a simple and understandable questionnaire.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rocwe","text":"3. Step 3: Select participants according to research needs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7msb2","text":"4. Step 4: Distribute the questionnaire online or offline.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uqki6","text":"5. Step 5: Collect and store responses securely.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"p4wsp","text":"- Printed questionnaire or Google Form","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xcukp","text":"- Pen or pencil (if paper-based)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cvmc9","text":"- Mobile phone or computer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ggiha","text":"- Internet connection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ovea7","text":"- Consent form (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare a simple and understandable questionnaire.
Select participants according to research needs.
Distribute the questionnaire online or offline.
